findings.title: sDOLA collateral can be overvalued by donating DOLA into the vault/savings path

best_agent_match.title: sDOLA collateral can be re-priced by donating assets directly to the vault

findings.title: Borrow sizing and liquidation are synchronously manipulable through flash-loaned pool and LLAMMA state

best_agent_match.title: Loan sizing and liquidation depend on flash-loanable spot liquidity from thin pools

rejected_candidates.title: Liquidations become executable in the same transaction as the price manipulation
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into F-002 as the same root issue: liquidation eligibility and borrow sizing both consume manipulable same-transaction market state.

rejected_candidates.title: Zero-amount LLAMMA exchanges appear to mutate market state for free
rejected_candidates.reason: The exploit uses zero-amount `exchange` calls as a likely poke, but this file alone does not prove the call changes protocol state in a distinct, reportable way rather than being incidental to the broader oracle/state-manipulation issue.
